overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing third-person driving on an elevated highway at dusk. The player follows a red car through Night City, passing under massive overpasses and alongside holographic billboards, with a flying AV vehicle hovering overhead and the neon-lit city skyline visible against the darkening sky.

events.description: driving under the massive San Joaquin overpass structure with heavy concrete pillars
accelerating onto the main highway lane following the red vehicle ahead

agents.ego_description: driving a car on the elevated highway maintaining steady speed behind a red vehicle

notable_agents.action: red car driving steadily ahead on the highway

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure with illuminated San Joaquin signage
futuristic aerial vehicle hovering above the highway with running lights
elevated highway infrastructure with concrete support pillars
tall modern street lamps lining the highway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the camera driving under a massive concrete overpass structure marked with San Joaquin signage. The highway is multi-lane with smooth asphalt, and a flying vehicle hovers overhead. Street lights line the right side as the camera follows a red car accelerating onto the main highway stretch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with emerging city skyline views

events.description: exiting the covered overpass structure into open highway with clear sky visibility
city skyline with illuminated skyscrapers becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while passing a large red billboard on the left side

notable_agents.action: red car continuing straight ahead on the highway

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with red background and product advertisement
distant neon-lit skyscrapers of Night City against the dusk sky
dark silhouetted mountains visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered overpass into an open highway section. A large red billboard dominates the left side while the Night City skyline with glowing skyscrapers emerges on the left horizon. The flying vehicle remains visible overhead, and distant mountains appear in the background haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with large digital billboard displays

events.description: approaching the digital billboard district with large holographic advertisements
passing large digital billboards displaying advertisements on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving past illuminated digital advertisements while maintaining lane position

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screens showing product advertisements and holographic displays
overhead metal structure supporting directional highway signs

segments.scene_description: The highway continues past a cluster of bright digital billboards on the right displaying holographic advertisements. The city skyline grows larger on the left as the camera approaches an overhead road sign gantry. The flying vehicle maintains its position overhead against the darkening sky.

events.description: passing under directional road signs indicating Westbrook and Charter Hill exits
navigating the gentle left curve of the highway with city views expanding

agents.ego_description: following the highway curve with the red car ahead, city skyline prominent on the left

notable_agents.action: red car navigating the left curve ahead of the camera

entered.detail: highway signs indicating directions to Westbrook and Charter Hill districts

segments.scene_description: The camera navigates a left curve on the highway, passing under directional signs for Westbrook and Charter Hill. The Night City skyline looms larger on the left with brightly lit towers, while the highway continues through the curve with the red car maintaining its lead position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated highway that transitions from the shadow of massive concrete structures into the neon-lit expanse of the Night City skyline. It begins by driving under a heavy overpass marked with San Joaquin signage, following a red car as a flying vehicle hovers overhead. As the camera exits the covered section, the environment opens up to reveal a large red billboard and the glowing skyscrapers of the city emerging on the horizon against a hazy backdrop of distant mountains. The scene then shifts past a cluster of bright holographic advertisements on the right, with the city skyline growing larger and more imposing as the camera approaches an overhead road sign gantry. Finally, the highway curves to the left under directional signs for Westbrook and Charter Hill, bringing the brightly lit towers of the city into full view as the red car leads the way forward.
